title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch.
longDescription: This comprehensive bootcamp takes you from absolute beginner to job-ready web developer. You will learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive design, frontend frameworks, backend development, databases, authentication, deployment, and real-world project building. Throughout the course, you will work on practical projects that help strengthen your portfolio and gain confidence in building complete web applications.

title: Advanced React & Next.js
description: Build modern web applications using React and Next.js.
longDescription: Master advanced React patterns and Next.js development techniques. Learn server-side rendering, static site generation, API routes, authentication, state management, performance optimization, and production deployment. Build scalable applications using industry-standard best practices and modern frontend architecture.

title: JavaScript Mastery
description: Master JavaScript fundamentals and advanced concepts.
longDescription: Build a strong foundation in JavaScript while exploring advanced concepts such as closures, asynchronous programming, promises, ES6+, modules, object-oriented programming, and modern development practices. The course focuses on practical coding exercises and real-world examples.

title: UI/UX Design Essentials
description: Learn the principles of user interface and user experience design.
longDescription: Understand the foundations of creating visually appealing and user-friendly digital products. Learn design thinking, wireframing, prototyping, usability testing, accessibility, and user research techniques used by professional designers.

title: Figma for Designers
description: Design professional interfaces and prototypes using Figma.
longDescription: Learn how to use Figma efficiently for UI design, collaboration, prototyping, design systems, and responsive layouts. By the end of the course, you'll be able to create professional-grade designs and collaborate effectively with development teams.

title: Graphic Design Masterclass
description: Create stunning visual designs and branding materials.
longDescription: Develop professional graphic design skills through hands-on projects. Learn branding, typography, color theory, layout design, advertising materials, social media graphics, and portfolio creation using industry-standard techniques.

title: Digital Marketing Fundamentals
description: Understand the basics of digital marketing and online growth.
longDescription: Learn the core pillars of digital marketing including content marketing, SEO, email campaigns, paid advertising, social media strategies, and analytics. Gain practical knowledge to grow businesses online.

title: SEO Strategy & Optimization
description: Improve website visibility through effective SEO techniques.
longDescription: Master on-page SEO, technical SEO, keyword research, backlink building, search intent optimization, and content strategy. Learn how to rank websites higher and drive organic traffic consistently.

title: Social Media Marketing
description: Grow brands and engage audiences through social platforms.
longDescription: Learn how to create successful social media campaigns, increase engagement, build brand awareness, and generate leads using platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.

title: Python for Beginners
description: Learn Python programming from the ground up.
longDescription: Start your programming journey with Python. Learn syntax, variables, loops, functions, object-oriented programming, file handling, and project development through beginner-friendly lessons and exercises.

title: Data Science with Python
description: Analyze data and build machine learning models using Python.
longDescription: This course provides a complete introduction to data science using Python. Learn how to collect, clean, analyze, and visualize data while exploring machine learning fundamentals. Through real-world datasets and projects, you'll gain hands-on experience with industry-standard tools used by data scientists worldwide.

title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Understand machine learning algorithms and applications.
longDescription: Explore the foundations of machine learning and artificial intelligence. Learn supervised and unsupervised learning, model training, evaluation techniques, and practical implementation using Python. Build predictive models and understand how machine learning powers modern applications.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter.
longDescription: Learn how to create beautiful and high-performance mobile applications using Flutter and Dart. This course covers UI design, state management, API integration, local storage, authentication, and app deployment for both Android and iOS platforms.

title: Cybersecurity Basics
description: Learn how to protect systems and data from cyber threats.
longDescription: Gain a strong foundation in cybersecurity concepts, including network security, malware protection, risk management, password security, encryption, and safe online practices. Understand common threats and how organizations defend against cyber attacks.

title: Cloud Computing Essentials
description: Understand cloud services and deployment models.
longDescription: Learn the core principles of cloud computing and how businesses leverage cloud technologies. Explore cloud service models, virtualization, storage solutions, deployment strategies, security considerations, and leading cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

title: Project Management Professional
description: Manage projects efficiently using industry best practices.
longDescription: Develop the skills needed to successfully manage projects from initiation to completion. Learn project planning, scheduling, budgeting, risk management, stakeholder communication, Agile methodologies, and leadership techniques used by project managers worldwide.

title: Business Analytics
description: Use data-driven insights to make business decisions.
longDescription: Learn how to transform business data into actionable insights. This course covers data analysis techniques, reporting, visualization, forecasting, KPI tracking, and decision-making frameworks that help organizations improve performance and achieve strategic goals.

title: Artificial Intelligence Foundations
description: Explore the core concepts and future of artificial intelligence.
longDescription: Dive into the world of artificial intelligence and understand the technologies shaping the future. Learn about machine learning, neural networks, deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, AI ethics, and real-world AI applications across industries.
